children.source_sentence: Our Talent Management Framework forms the foundation of our approach to building a workforce equipped to advance the energy transition.

children.source_sentence: stone in our Upgrade programme in 2024 was the appointment of Sembcorp Solar Singapore as the first SkillsFuture Queen Bee for the Energy and Power sector.

children.source_sentence: This programme underscores our commitment to advance the solar industry in Singapore.

children.source_sentence: At Sembcorp, we are committed to making the energy transition an inclusive one for the communities where we operate.

children.source_sentence: Increasingly, climate change is also causing shifts in global wind patterns and average temperatures, which may affect renewable energy generation.

[ASSERTED] We also have opportunities to drive the growth and development of low-carbon solutions to
children.source_sentence: Conversely, we also have opportunities to drive the growth and development of low-carbon solutions to enable the global energy transition.

children.source_sentence: We recognise our role in driving the collective transition towards a lower-carbon economy.

children.label: [ASSERTED] We remain focused on executing on our 2028 targets to grow our renewables portfolio and re
children.source_sentence: We remain focused on executing on our 2028 targets to grow our renewables portfolio and reduce our emissions intensity.

children.label: [ASSERTED] We work with partners to grow our renewable energy capacity and explore new decarbonisatio
children.source_sentence: We work with partners to grow our renewable energy capacity and explore new decarbonisation technologies.

children.label: [ASSERTED] The ERCC supports the inclusion of sustainability-linked KPIs and targets such as GHG emis
children.source_sentence: The ERCC supports the inclusion of sustainability-linked KPIs and targets such as GHG emissions intensity and gross installed renewable energy capacity for key management personnel.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Absolute GHG emissions (Scope 1 and 2) decreased to 9.3 million tonnes of carbon dioxide e
children.source_sentence: Absolute GHG emissions (Scope 1 and 2) decreased to 9.3 million tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalent (million tCO2e), primarily due to the concession expiry of the Phu My 3 Power Plant in February 2024.

children.label: [ASSERTED] GHG emissions intensity2 reduced to 0.27 tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalent per megawatt-
children.source_sentence: GHG emissions intensity2 reduced to 0.27 tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalent per megawatt-hour (tCO2e/MWh), driven by the reduction in absolute GHG emissions and increase in our renewable energy generation.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Scope 3 emissions3 decreased by 6% to 15.7 million tCO2e in 2024. This is mainly driven by
children.source_sentence: Scope 3 emissions3 decreased by 6% to 15.7 million tCO2e in 2024. This is mainly driven by a reduction in emissions under Category 15 – Investments, attributed to the repayment of the Deferred Payment Note following the sale of Sembcorp Energy India Limited (SEIL).

children.label: [ASSERTED] The renewable energy generated by our operating assets is equivalent to approximately 9.4
children.source_sentence: The renewable energy generated by our operating assets is equivalent to approximately 9.4 million tCO2e emissions avoided.

children.label: [ASSERTED] We have engaged DNV Business Assurance Singapore Pte. Ltd. (DNV) to undertake an independe
children.source_sentence: We have engaged DNV Business Assurance Singapore Pte. Ltd. (DNV) to undertake an independent limited assurance of our Scope 1 and 2 emissions data.

children.label: [ASSERTED] The SSP1-2.6 scenario envisions global consumption oriented towards low material growth as
children.source_sentence: SSP1-2.6 (“Sustainability”) Global consumption is oriented towards low material growth as well as lower resource and energy intensity. Carbon emissions would fall from current levels and reach net-zero by around 2075

children.label: [ASSERTED] The SSP2-4.5 scenario reflects slow progress in achieving sustainable development goals, w
children.source_sentence: 2.7ºC SSP2-4.5 (“Middle-of-the-road”) Slow progress in achieving sustainable development goals. Carbon emissions would remain high until 2050, before starting to decline post-2050 but no net-zero is achieved

children.label: [ASSERTED] The SSP5-8.5 scenario describes a push for economic and social development coupled with ex
children.source_sentence: 4.4ºC SSP5-8.5 (“Fossil-fuelled Development”) The push for economic and social development is coupled with exploitation of abundant fossil fuel sources and resource and energy intensive lifestyles. Carbon emissions would double from current levels by 2050 and continue to rise until the end of century

children.label: [ASSERTED] Transition risks stem from uncertainties brought about by the global shift towards a low-c
children.source_sentence: Transition risks stem from uncertainties brought about by the global shift towards a low-carbon economy. These risks can arise from changes in climate-related policy and regulations, as well as technological advancements, amongst others.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Sembcorp monitors the regulatory framework and conducts risk-based scenario analysis to as
children.source_sentence: We monitor the regulatory framework and conduct risk-based scenario analysis to assess exposure to carbon pricing.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Sembcorp applies a market-specific internal carbon price to evaluate the financial impact
children.source_sentence: We apply a market-specific internal carbon price to evaluate the financial impact of carbon pricing regulations on the profitability of our gas and related energy assets.

children.label: air_quality (w=0.1, credit=0.25)
[INFERRED] The company likely monitors and mitigates air quality impacts through adherence to environ
children.source_sentence: The company likely monitors and mitigates air quality impacts through adherence to environmental regulations and implementation of emission control technologies, given its focus on decarbonisation and resource management.

children.label: water_management (w=0.1, credit=0.25)
[INFERRED] The company probably employs efficient water management practices, including recycling and
children.source_sentence: The company probably employs efficient water management practices, including recycling and conservation measures, to minimise water withdrawal and ensure sustainable cooling water usage in its operations.

workforce_safety (w=0.15, credit=0.7)

children.source_sentence: These risks include corruption, non-compliance with laws, as well as health and safety.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Sembcorp is committed to having a robust health and safety management system to mitigate r
children.source_sentence: It is why we are committed to having a robust health and safety management system that is supported by strong implementation and monitoring, to mitigate any risk of unintended impact on people, minimise operational disruptions and improve business resilience.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Sembcorp recognises the right to life, health, and safe working conditions and is committe
children.source_sentence: We recognise the right to life, health and safe working conditions, and are committed to reducing health and safety risks in our operations.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Sembcorp requires its contractors to comply with its health and safety requirements to pre
children.source_sentence: We also require our contractors to comply with our health and safety requirements to prevent and manage health and safety risks.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Sembcorp's Group HSSE management system is internally audited and conforms to relevant Occ
children.source_sentence: Our Group HSSE management system is internally audited and conforms to the relevant Occupational Health and Safety Assessment Series and ISO Standards, and applies to all employees.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Three contractor fatalities occurred at Sembcorp's sites in 2024, involving incidents in I
children.source_sentence: Regrettably, three contractor fatalities occurred at our sites during the year, involving two incidents in India and one in Oman.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Sembcorp's lost time injury rate and total recordable injury rate remained the same at 0.5
children.source_sentence: Overall, the lost time injury rate and total recordable injury rate remained the same at 0.5 and 1.0, respectively, in 2024.

children.source_sentence: The company likely invests in grid infrastructure and technologies to enhance reliability and supply security, aligning with its commitment to supporting Asia’s energy transition and resilient business practices.

claims.text: Sembcorp’s wind assets are located at Gujarat, India.
claims.source_sentence: Sembcorp’s wind assets located at Gujarat, India

claims.text: Energy companies play a transformative role in an inclusive energy transition.
claims.source_sentence: Energy companies play a transformative role in an inclusive energy transition.

claims.text: We also have opportunities to drive the growth and development of low-carbon solutions to enable the global energy transition.
claims.source_sentence: Conversely, we also have opportunities to drive the growth and development of low-carbon solutions to enable the global energy transition.

claims.text: These risks include corruption, non-compliance with laws, as well as health and safety.
claims.source_sentence: These risks include corruption, non-compliance with laws, as well as health and safety.

claims.text: In line with our purpose to drive the energy transition, we have adopted SDG 7 (Affordable and Clean Energy) and SDG 13 (Climate Action) as our priority SDGs.
claims.source_sentence: In line with our purpose to drive the energy transition, we have adopted SDG 7 (Affordable and Clean Energy) and SDG 13 (Climate Action) as our priority SDGs.

claims.text: We recognise our role in driving the collective transition towards a lower-carbon economy.
claims.source_sentence: We recognise our role in driving the collective transition towards a lower-carbon economy.

claims.text: We are driven to support Asia’s transition to a clean and responsible future.
claims.source_sentence: We are driven to support Asia’s transition to a clean and responsible future.

claims.text: We remain focused on executing on our 2028 targets to grow our renewables portfolio and reduce our emissions intensity.
claims.source_sentence: We remain focused on executing on our 2028 targets to grow our renewables portfolio and reduce our emissions intensity.

claims.text: We work with partners to grow our renewable energy capacity and explore new decarbonisation technologies.
claims.source_sentence: We work with partners to grow our renewable energy capacity and explore new decarbonisation technologies.

claims.text: The ERCC supports the inclusion of sustainability-linked KPIs and targets such as GHG emissions intensity and gross installed renewable energy capacity for key management personnel.
claims.source_sentence: The ERCC supports the inclusion of sustainability-linked KPIs and targets such as GHG emissions intensity and gross installed renewable energy capacity for key management personnel.

claims.text: Absolute GHG emissions (Scope 1 and 2) decreased to 9.3 million tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalent (million tCO2e), primarily due to the concession expiry of the Phu My 3 Power Plant in February 2024.
claims.source_sentence: Absolute GHG emissions (Scope 1 and 2) decreased to 9.3 million tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalent (million tCO2e), primarily due to the concession expiry of the Phu My 3 Power Plant in February 2024.

claims.text: GHG emissions intensity2 reduced to 0.27 tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalent per megawatt-hour (tCO2e/MWh), driven by the reduction in absolute GHG emissions and increase in our renewable energy generation.
claims.source_sentence: GHG emissions intensity2 reduced to 0.27 tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalent per megawatt-hour (tCO2e/MWh), driven by the reduction in absolute GHG emissions and increase in our renewable energy generation.

claims.text: Scope 3 emissions3 decreased by 6% to 15.7 million tCO2e in 2024. This is mainly driven by a reduction in emissions under Category 15 – Investments, attributed to the repayment of the Deferred Payment Note following the sale of Sembcorp Energy India Limited (SEIL).
claims.source_sentence: Scope 3 emissions3 decreased by 6% to 15.7 million tCO2e in 2024. This is mainly driven by a reduction in emissions under Category 15 – Investments, attributed to the repayment of the Deferred Payment Note following the sale of Sembcorp Energy India Limited (SEIL).

claims.text: The renewable energy generated by our operating assets is equivalent to approximately 9.4 million tCO2e emissions avoided.
claims.source_sentence: The renewable energy generated by our operating assets is equivalent to approximately 9.4 million tCO2e emissions avoided.

claims.text: In the fast-evolving energy transition landscape, employees equipped with the right competencies and experience position us to capture opportunities while meeting the energy needs of our stakeholders securely, sustainably and affordably.
claims.source_sentence: In the fast-evolving energy transition landscape, employees equipped with the right competencies and experience position us to capture opportunities while meeting the energy needs of our stakeholders securely, sustainably and affordably.

claims.text: Our Talent Management Framework forms the foundation of our approach to building a workforce equipped to advance the energy transition.
claims.source_sentence: Our Talent Management Framework forms the foundation of our approach to building a workforce equipped to advance the energy transition.

claims.text: Sembcorp Solar Singapore was appointed as the first SkillsFuture Queen Bee for the Energy and Power sector in 2024.
claims.source_sentence: stone in our Upgrade programme in 2024 was the appointment of Sembcorp Solar Singapore as the first SkillsFuture Queen Bee for the Energy and Power sector.

claims.text: The SkillsFuture Queen Bee programme underscores Sembcorp's commitment to advance the solar industry in Singapore.
claims.source_sentence: This programme underscores our commitment to advance the solar industry in Singapore.

claims.text: Sembcorp is committed to having a robust health and safety management system to mitigate risks and improve business resilience.
claims.source_sentence: It is why we are committed to having a robust health and safety management system that is supported by strong implementation and monitoring, to mitigate any risk of unintended impact on people, minimise operational disruptions and improve business resilience.

claims.text: Sembcorp recognises the right to life, health, and safe working conditions and is committed to reducing health and safety risks in its operations.
claims.source_sentence: We recognise the right to life, health and safe working conditions, and are committed to reducing health and safety risks in our operations.

claims.text: Sembcorp requires its contractors to comply with its health and safety requirements to prevent and manage health and safety risks.
claims.source_sentence: We also require our contractors to comply with our health and safety requirements to prevent and manage health and safety risks.

claims.text: Sembcorp's Group HSSE management system is internally audited and conforms to relevant Occupational Health and Safety Assessment Series and ISO Standards.
claims.source_sentence: Our Group HSSE management system is internally audited and conforms to the relevant Occupational Health and Safety Assessment Series and ISO Standards, and applies to all employees.

claims.text: Three contractor fatalities occurred at Sembcorp's sites in 2024, involving incidents in India and Oman.
claims.source_sentence: Regrettably, three contractor fatalities occurred at our sites during the year, involving two incidents in India and one in Oman.

claims.text: Sembcorp's lost time injury rate and total recordable injury rate remained the same at 0.5 and 1.0, respectively, in 2024.
claims.source_sentence: Overall, the lost time injury rate and total recordable injury rate remained the same at 0.5 and 1.0, respectively, in 2024.

claims.text: Sembcorp is committed to making the energy transition inclusive for the communities where it operates.
claims.source_sentence: At Sembcorp, we are committed to making the energy transition an inclusive one for the communities where we operate.

claims.text: We have engaged DNV Business Assurance Singapore Pte. Ltd. (DNV) to undertake an independent limited assurance of our Scope 1 and 2 emissions data.
claims.source_sentence: We have engaged DNV Business Assurance Singapore Pte. Ltd. (DNV) to undertake an independent limited assurance of our Scope 1 and 2 emissions data.

claims.text: The SSP1-2.6 scenario envisions global consumption oriented towards low material growth as well as lower resource and energy intensity, with carbon emissions falling from current levels and reaching net-zero by around 2075.
claims.source_sentence: SSP1-2.6 (“Sustainability”) Global consumption is oriented towards low material growth as well as lower resource and energy intensity. Carbon emissions would fall from current levels and reach net-zero by around 2075

claims.text: The SSP2-4.5 scenario reflects slow progress in achieving sustainable development goals, with carbon emissions remaining high until 2050 and declining post-2050 without achieving net-zero.
claims.source_sentence: 2.7ºC SSP2-4.5 (“Middle-of-the-road”) Slow progress in achieving sustainable development goals. Carbon emissions would remain high until 2050, before starting to decline post-2050 but no net-zero is achieved

claims.text: The SSP5-8.5 scenario describes a push for economic and social development coupled with exploitation of abundant fossil fuel sources, leading to carbon emissions doubling from current levels by 2050 and continuing to rise until the end of the century.
claims.source_sentence: 4.4ºC SSP5-8.5 (“Fossil-fuelled Development”) The push for economic and social development is coupled with exploitation of abundant fossil fuel sources and resource and energy intensive lifestyles. Carbon emissions would double from current levels by 2050 and continue to rise until the end of century

claims.text: Transition risks stem from uncertainties brought about by the global shift towards a low-carbon economy, including changes in climate-related policy and regulations, as well as technological advancements.
claims.source_sentence: Transition risks stem from uncertainties brought about by the global shift towards a low-carbon economy. These risks can arise from changes in climate-related policy and regulations, as well as technological advancements, amongst others.

claims.text: Climate change is causing shifts in global wind patterns and average temperatures, which may affect renewable energy generation.
claims.source_sentence: Increasingly, climate change is also causing shifts in global wind patterns and average temperatures, which may affect renewable energy generation.

claims.text: Sembcorp monitors the regulatory framework and conducts risk-based scenario analysis to assess exposure to carbon pricing.
claims.source_sentence: We monitor the regulatory framework and conduct risk-based scenario analysis to assess exposure to carbon pricing.

claims.text: Sembcorp applies a market-specific internal carbon price to evaluate the financial impact of carbon pricing regulations on the profitability of its gas and related energy assets.
claims.source_sentence: We apply a market-specific internal carbon price to evaluate the financial impact of carbon pricing regulations on the profitability of our gas and related energy assets.

claims.text: The company likely monitors and mitigates air quality impacts through adherence to environmental regulations and implementation of emission control technologies, given its focus on decarbonisation and resource management.

The company probably employs efficient water management practices, including recycling and conservation measures, to minimise water withdrawal and ensure sustainable cooling water usage in its operations.

The company likely invests in grid infrastructure and technologies to enhance reliability and supply security, aligning with its commitment to supporting Asia’s energy transition and resilient business practices.
